briefdescription.para: Maximum size of an ECDH vector.
Enumeration defining ECDH modes supported by the SI91X device.

detaileddescription.para: This enumeration defines the modes of operation for the ECDH algorithm on the SI91X device.
This enumeration defines the types of ECDH operations supported, such as ECDH Multiplication, Addition, Subtraction, Double, and Affinity.
This enumeration defines the different ECDH vector sizes supported, which includes 24, 28, and 32 bytes.
This enumeration defines the different ECDH curves supported, which includes Prime field curves, binary curves, and Edwards curves.

memberdef.argsstring: (sl_si91x_ecdh_mode_t ecdh_mode, const uint8_t *sx, const uint8_t *sy, const uint8_t *sz, const uint8_t *tx, const uint8_t *ty, const uint8_t *tz, uint8_t *rx, uint8_t *ry, uint8_t *rz)
memberdef.name: sl_si91x_ecdh_point_addition

briefdescription.para: To compute the ECDH point addition vector.

detaileddescription.para:
This is a blocking API.
ecdh_mode
ECDH mode of type sl_si91x_ecdh_mode_t.
sx
Pointer to the x coordinate of the first point to be added.
sy
Pointer to the y coordinate of the first point to be added.
sz
Pointer to the z coordinate of the first point to be added.
tx
Pointer to the x coordinate of the second point to be added.
ty
Pointer to the y coordinate of the second point to be added.
tz
Pointer to the z coordinate of the second point to be added.
rx
Pointer to the x coordinate of the result point.
ry
Pointer to the y coordinate of the result point.
rz
Pointer to the z coordinate of the result point.
sl_status_t. For more information on status codes, refer to SL STATUS DOCUMENTATION.

memberdef.argsstring: (sl_si91x_ecdh_mode_t ecdh_mode, const uint8_t *sx, const uint8_t *sy, const uint8_t *sz, const uint8_t *tx, const uint8_t *ty, const uint8_t *tz, uint8_t *rx, uint8_t *ry, uint8_t *rz)
memberdef.name: sl_si91x_ecdh_point_subtraction

briefdescription.para: To compute the ECDH point subtraction vector.

detaileddescription.para:
This is a blocking API.
ecdh_mode
ECDH mode of type sl_si91x_ecdh_mode_t.
sx
Pointer to the x coordinate of the first point to be subtracted.
sy
Pointer to the y coordinate of the first point to be subtracted.
sz
Pointer to the z coordinate of the first point to be subtracted.
tx
Pointer to the x coordinate of the second point to be subtracted.
ty
Pointer to the y coordinate of the second point to be subtracted.
tz
Pointer to the z coordinate of the second point to be subtracted.
rx
Pointer to the x coordinate of the result point.
ry
Pointer to the y coordinate of the result point.
rz
Pointer to the z coordinate of the result point.
sl_status_t. For more information on status codes, refer to SL STATUS DOCUMENTATION.

memberdef.argsstring: (sl_si91x_ecdh_mode_t ecdh_mode, const uint8_t *d, const uint8_t *sx, const uint8_t *sy, const uint8_t *sz, uint32_t affinity, uint8_t *rx, uint8_t *ry, uint8_t *rz, uint8_t reverse)
memberdef.name: sl_si91x_ecdh_point_multiplication

briefdescription.para: To compute the ECDH point multiplication vector.

detaileddescription.para:
This is a blocking API.
ecdh_mode
ECDH mode of type sl_si91x_ecdh_mode_t.
d
Pointer to the scalar value to be multiplied.
sx
Pointer to the x coordinate of the point to be multiplied with scalar 'd'.
sy
Pointer to the y coordinate of the point to be multiplied with scalar 'd'.
sz
Pointer to the z coordinate of the point to be multiplied with scalar 'd'.
affinity
Affinity mode:
0 : no affinity
1 : affinity on input
2 : affinity on output
3 : affinity on both input and output
rx
Pointer to the x coordinate of the result point.
ry
Pointer to the y coordinate of the result point.
rz
Pointer to the z coordinate of the result point.
reverse
Setting this will perform reverse_8 on the inputs and outputs.
sl_status_t. For more information on status codes, refer to SL STATUS DOCUMENTATION.

memberdef.argsstring: (sl_si91x_ecdh_mode_t ecdh_mode, const uint8_t *sx, const uint8_t *sy, const uint8_t *sz, uint8_t *rx, uint8_t *ry, uint8_t *rz)
memberdef.name: sl_si91x_ecdh_point_double

briefdescription.para: To compute the ECDH point double vector.

detaileddescription.para:
This is a blocking API.
ecdh_mode
ECDH mode of type sl_si91x_ecdh_mode_t.
sx
Pointer to the x coordinate of the point to be doubled.
sy
Pointer to the y coordinate of the point to be doubled.
sz
Pointer to the z coordinate of the point to be doubled.
rx
Pointer to the x coordinate of the result point.
ry
Pointer to the y coordinate of the result point.
rz
Pointer to the z coordinate of the result point.
sl_status_t. For more information on status codes, refer to SL STATUS DOCUMENTATION.

memberdef.argsstring: (sl_si91x_ecdh_mode_t ecdh_mode, const uint8_t *sx, const uint8_t *sy, const uint8_t *sz, uint8_t *rx, uint8_t *ry, uint8_t *rz)
memberdef.name: sl_si91x_ecdh_point_affine

briefdescription.para: To compute the ECDH point affinity vector.

detaileddescription.para:
This is a blocking API.
ecdh_mode
ECDH mode of type sl_si91x_ecdh_mode_t.
sx
Pointer to the x coordinate of the point.
sy
Pointer to the y coordinate of the point.
sz
Pointer to the z coordinate of the point.
rx
Pointer to the x coordinate of the result point.
ry
Pointer to the y coordinate of the result point.
rz
Pointer to the z coordinate of the result point.
sl_status_t. For more information on status codes, refer to SL STATUS DOCUMENTATION.

This software is provided 'as-is', without any express or implied warranty. In no event will the authors be held liable for any damages arising from the use of this software.
Permission is granted to anyone to use this software for any purpose, including commercial applications, and to alter it and redistribute it freely, subject to the following restrictions:

listitem.para: The origin of this software must not be misrepresented; you must not claim that you wrote the original software. If you use this software in a product, an acknowledgment in the product documentation would be appreciated but is not required.
Altered source versions must be plainly marked as such, and must not be misrepresented as being the original software.
This notice may not be removed or altered from any source distribution.
